title: ACKS II — Locations & Settlements
description: Location primitives for the ACKS II module family: the settlement/location actor, market and demographic data schemas, and per-world imported rules tables (people, wages, availability, class distributions) served to sibling modules through acks-lib. Ships no book content - tables are imported from your own ACKS II PDFs.

requires.reason: tables registry + the ruledata-import service contract this module provides
